query_normalized: multi-lcb: extending livecodebench to multiple programming languages computer science
rationale: This paper is the exact match for the user's research question, as the title and abstract confirm it introduces "Multi-LCB," the specific extension of LiveCodeBench to multiple programming languages. It satisfies criteria (a) and (b) by directly measuring the mechanism (cross-language code generation evaluation) and variables (performance across 12 languages) central to the user's inquiry.
